title: Register for the Youth MC Training Programme
description: Apply to train as an MC, presenter or radio host on the Youth MC Training Programme.
summary: The Youth MC Training Programme trains young Barbadians to MC, present and host – on stage, on radio, and online. It is run by the Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment.
Training covers the basics of stage presence, scriptwriting, voice control, audience interaction and working with a production team. Participants get coaching from established MCs and presenters.
The 2025 form is currently not open. Check back when registration opens.
The programme is open to people aged 14 to 25. If you are under 16, a parent or guardian needs to register you and give their consent.
who_can_apply: parents or guardians registering a young person under 16

items: the participant’s full name, address and date of birth
their level of experience with public speaking or hosting
for under-16s, the parent or guardian’s details

how_long: Places are usually confirmed within 2 weeks of the closing date.

options.heading: Online when registration opens
content: Complete the Youth MC Training Programme Registration Form on the Ministry website during the registration window.

contact.agency: Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment
contact.address:
Sky Mall, Haggatt Hall
St. Michael

assumptions: ‘Aged 14 to 25’ is the commonly-quoted eligibility range.
‘Places are usually confirmed within 2 weeks’ is an estimate.
List of training topics is based on common MC training, not the form.
